zh.lifeSummary: 當Eleanor Boteler Countess of Desmond於1350年出生在愛爾蘭庫迪 基爾堅尼時，她的父親James Boteler 2nd Earl of Ormond19歲，母親Lady Elizabeth Anne de Darcy, Countess of Badsworth and Ormond18歲。她於1359年7月20日與Gerald FitzMaurice FitzGerald 3rd Earl of Desmond結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和4個女兒的父母。她去世於1392年在愛爾蘭庫迪 迪拉利瑟萊斯享年42歲，埋葬在愛爾蘭庫迪 迪拉利瑟萊斯。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Eleanor Boteler Countess of Desmond于1350年出生在爱尔兰庫迪 基爾堅尼时，她的父亲James Boteler 2nd Earl of Ormond19岁，母亲Lady Elizabeth Anne de Darcy, Countess of Badsworth and Ormond18岁。她于1359年7月20日与Gerald FitzMaurice FitzGerald 3rd Earl of Desmond结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和4个女儿的父母。她去世于1392年在爱尔兰庫迪 迪拉利瑟萊斯享年42岁，埋葬在爱尔兰庫迪 迪拉利瑟萊斯。

nameMeanings.name: Boteler
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: occupational name for a maker of leather bottles, from an agent derivative of Middle English botel, Old French bouteille ‘bottle’.

nameMeanings.name: Eleanor
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old French respelling of the Old Provençal name Alienor. This has sometimes been taken as a derivative of Helen , but it is more probably of Germanic derivation (the first element being ali ‘other, foreign’ the second is obscure). The name was introduced to England by Eleanor of Aquitaine ( 1122–1204 ), who came from Aquitaine in south-west France to be the wife of King Henry II . It was also borne by Eleanor of Provence, the wife of Henry III , and Eleanor of Castile, wife of Edward I .

variants.name: Ellenor
meanings: Variant spelling of   Eleanor  , the result of blending with   Ellen .

variants.name: Elenor
meanings: From an Old French respelling of the Old Provençal name Alienor. This has sometimes been taken as a derivative of Helen , but it is more probably of Germanic derivation (the first element being ali ‘other, foreign’ the second is obscure). The name was introduced to England by Eleanor of Aquitaine ( 1122–1204 ), who came from Aquitaine in south-west France to be the wife of King Henry II . It was also borne by Eleanor of Provence, the wife of Henry III , and Eleanor of Castile, wife of Edward I .

en.lifeSummary: When Eleanor Boteler Countess of Desmond was born in 1350, in County Kilkenny, Ireland, her father, James Boteler 2nd Earl of Ormond, was 19 and her mother, Lady Elizabeth Anne de Darcy, Countess of Badsworth and Ormond, was 18. She married Gerald FitzMaurice FitzGerald 3rd Earl of Desmond on 20 July 1359. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 4 daughters. She died in 1392, in Thurles, County Tipperary, Ireland, at the age of 42, and was buried in Thurles, County Tipperary, Ireland.

fr.County of the Cross of Tipperary, Irelan: County of the Cross of Tipperary, Irlande
fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Eleanor Boteler Countess of Desmond est née en 1350, à County Kilkenny, Irlande, son père, James Boteler 2nd Earl of Ormond, avait 19 ans et sa mère, Lady Elizabeth Anne de Darcy, Countess of Badsworth and Ormond, avait 18 ans. Elle a épousé Gerald FitzMaurice FitzGerald 3rd Earl of Desmond le 20 juillet 1359. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 4 filles. Elle est décédée en 1392, à Thurles, County Tipperary, Irlande, à l’âge de 42 ans, et a été enterrée à Thurles, County Tipperary, Irlande.

de.County of the Cross of Tipperary, Irelan: County of the Cross of Tipperary, Irland
de.lifeSummary: Als Eleanor Boteler Countess of Desmond 1350 in County Kilkenny, Irland geboren wurde, war ihr Vater James Boteler 2nd Earl of Ormond 19 und ihre Mutter Lady Elizabeth Anne de Darcy, Countess of Badsworth and Ormond 18. Sie hat am 20. Juli 1359 Gerald FitzMaurice FitzGerald 3rd Earl of Desmond geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 4 Töchter. Sie starb 1392 im Alter von 42 Jahren in Thurles, County Tipperary, Irland und wurde in Thurles, County Tipperary, Irland begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Eleanor Boteler Countess of Desmond è nata il nel 1350 nel County Kilkenny, Irlanda, sua padre, James Boteler 2nd Earl of Ormond, aveva 19 anni e sua madre, Lady Elizabeth Anne de Darcy, Countess of Badsworth and Ormond, aveva 18 anni. Lei sposato Gerald FitzMaurice FitzGerald 3rd Earl of Desmond il 20 luglio 1359. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 4 figlie. Morì nel 1392, nel Thurles, County Tipperary, Irlanda, all'età di 42 anni, e fu sepolta a Thurles, County Tipperary, Irlanda.

ja.lifeSummary: Eleanor Boteler Countess of Desmondが1350年にアイルランドコウントイ キルケニーで生まれた時，父James Boteler 2nd Earl of Ormondは19歳，母Lady Elizabeth Anne de Darcy, Countess of Badsworth and Ormondは18歳であった。1359年7月20日にGerald FitzMaurice FitzGerald 3rd Earl of Desmondと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と4人の娘の親であった。彼女は1392年にアイルランドコウントイ ティップエラリースウルレスで42歳で死去し，アイルランドコウントイ ティップエラリースウルレスにて埋葬された。

ko.County of the Cross of Tipperary, Irelan: 아일랜드 카운티 프 테 크로스 프 티페라리
ko.lifeSummary: Eleanor Boteler Countess of Desmond(이)가 1350년 아일랜드 카운티 킬켄이에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 James Boteler 2nd Earl of Ormond(은)는 19세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Lady Elizabeth Anne de Darcy, Countess of Badsworth and Ormond(은)는 18세였다. 그녀는 1359년 7월 20일 Gerald FitzMaurice FitzGerald 3rd Earl of Desmond(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1392년 아일랜드 카운티 티페라리 스를레스에서 42세의 나이로 사망했으며 아일랜드 카운티 티페라리 스를레스에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Eleanor Boteler Countess of Desmond nasceu em 1350, em County Kilkenny, Irlanda, seu pai, James Boteler 2nd Earl of Ormond, tinha 19 anos e sua mãe, Lady Elizabeth Anne de Darcy, Countess of Badsworth and Ormond, tinha 18 anos. Ela casou-se com Gerald FitzMaurice FitzGerald 3rd Earl of Desmond em 20 de julho de 1359. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 4 filhas. Ela faleceu em 1392, em Thurles, County Tipperary, Irlanda, com 42 anos, e foi sepultada em Thurles, County Tipperary, Irlanda.

ru.County of the Cross of Tipperary, Irelan: коунти оф т кросс оф типпирэри, Ирландия
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Eleanor Boteler Countess of Desmond родилась в 1350 г. в местности коунти килкенни, Ирландия, её отцу по имени James Boteler 2nd Earl of Ormond было 19 лет, а матери, которую звали Lady Elizabeth Anne de Darcy, Countess of Badsworth and Ormond, 18. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Gerald FitzMaurice FitzGerald 3rd Earl of Desmond 20 июля 1359 г. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 4 дочери. Она умерла в 1392 г. в местности турльс, коунти типпирэри, Ирландия в возрасте 42 лет и была похоронена в местности турльс, коунти типпирэри, Ирландия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Eleanor Boteler Countess of Desmond nació en 1350, en County Kilkenny, Irlanda, su papá, James Boteler 2nd Earl of Ormond, tenía 19 años y su mamá, Lady Elizabeth Anne de Darcy, Countess of Badsworth and Ormond, tenía 18 años. Se casó con Gerald FitzMaurice FitzGerald 3rd Earl of Desmond el 20 de julio de 1359. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos y 4 hijas. Murió en 1392, en Thurles, County Tipperary, Irlanda, a la edad de 42 años, y fue sepultada en Thurles, County Tipperary, Irlanda.
